case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. SHIFFONE C. MACEY

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS

MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR MAR-22-2010 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT (CONTINUED) ON MAR-24-2010 AT 9:30 AM IN 206 FOR DEFENDANT TO SEEK REPRESENTATION FROM A LAWYER AND APPEARANCE FROM COUNSEL IS REQUIRED. CASE DID NOT SETTLE WITH JUDGE PRO TEM. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MACEY, SHIFFONE C. JUDGMENT FOR INJUNCTIVE RELIEF TO ABATE A PUBLIC NUISANCE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.

COURT TRIAL ON MAR-24-2010 OFF CALENDAR - THE CASE SETTLES. THE COURT SIGNS JUDGMENT FOR INJUNCTIVE RELIEF TO ABATE A PUBLIC NUISANCE AND JUDGMENT ENTERED. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. JUDGE JEFFREY S. ROSS; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; REPORTER: CARLITO MANDIA, C.S.R. 	689 (D-611).
